languages.text: "Вертикальная разметка местности регулярно обновляется моей продвинутой вестибулярной аугментикой. Согласно диагностике, обновление происходило..." — {n}Из вокс-динамика магоса вырывается удивленный выдох -{/n} "Пять сотен оборотов назад? Нет, это невозможно..."

"The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics. According to diagnostic logs, the last update occurred..." {n}A startled exhalation escapes the Magos's vox-grille.{/n} "Five hundred cycles ago? No, that is impossible..."
languages.original_text: "Вертикальная разметка местности регулярно обновляется моей продвинутой вестибулярной аугментикой. Согласно диагностике, обновление происходило..." — {n}Из вокс-динамика магоса вырывается удивленный выдох -{/n} "Пять сотен оборотов назад? Нет, это невозможно..."

"The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics. According to diagnostic logs, the last update occurred..." {n}A startled exhalation escapes the Magos's vox-grille.{/n} "Five hundred cycles ago? No, that is impossible..."

languages.text: «El mapeado vertical del terreno se actualiza con regularidad gracias a mis auméticos vestibulares avanzados. Según el historial de diagnóstico, la última actualización tuvo lugar...». {n}La rejilla del voco del magos emite una exhalación sorprendida.{/n} «¿Quinientos ciclos? No, imposible...».
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics. According to diagnostic logs, the last update occurred..." {n}A startled exhalation escapes the Magos's vox-grille.{/n} "Five hundred cycles ago? No, that is impossible..."

traits.locale_text: «El mapeado vertical del terreno se actualiza con regularidad gracias a mis auméticos vestibulares avanzados. Según el historial de diagnóstico, la última actualización tuvo lugar...». {n}La rejilla del voco del magos emite una exhalación sorprendida.{/n} «¿Quinientos ciclos? No, imposible...».

languages.text: “地形垂直测绘数据会由我的高级前庭植入物定期更新。根据诊断记录，上次更新是在……”{n}一声惊呼从那贤者的音阵格栅中漏出。{/n}“五百个周期前？不，这不可能……”
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics. According to diagnostic logs, the last update occurred..." {n}A startled exhalation escapes the Magos's vox-grille.{/n} "Five hundred cycles ago? No, that is impossible..."

traits.locale_text: “地形垂直测绘数据会由我的高级前庭植入物定期更新。根据诊断记录，上次更新是在……”{n}一声惊呼从那贤者的音阵格栅中漏出。{/n}“五百个周期前？不，这不可能……”

languages.text: « La modélisation verticale du terrain est régulièrement mise à jour par mes augmétiques vestibulaires avancés. D'après les journaux diagnostiques, la dernière actualisation remonte à... » {n}Une exclamation de surprise s'échappe de la grille-vox du magos.{/n} « Cinq cents cycles ? Non, c'est impossible... »
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics. According to diagnostic logs, the last update occurred..." {n}A startled exhalation escapes the Magos's vox-grille.{/n} "Five hundred cycles ago? No, that is impossible..."

traits.locale_text: « La modélisation verticale du terrain est régulièrement mise à jour par mes augmétiques vestibulaires avancés. D'après les journaux diagnostiques, la dernière actualisation remonte à... » {n}Une exclamation de surprise s'échappe de la grille-vox du magos.{/n} « Cinq cents cycles ? Non, c'est impossible... »

languages.text: "Arazinin dikey haritalaması, gelişmiş vestibüler ogmetiklerimce düzenli olarak güncellenir. Teşhis günlüklerine göre son güncelleme gerçekleşti..." {n}Magos'un voks ızgarasından şaşkın bir nefes kaçıyor.{/n} "Beş yüz döngü önce mi? Hayır, bu imkânsız..."
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics. According to diagnostic logs, the last update occurred..." {n}A startled exhalation escapes the Magos's vox-grille.{/n} "Five hundred cycles ago? No, that is impossible..."

traits.locale_text: "Arazinin dikey haritalaması, gelişmiş vestibüler ogmetiklerimce düzenli olarak güncellenir. Teşhis günlüklerine göre son güncelleme gerçekleşti..." {n}Magos'un voks ızgarasından şaşkın bir nefes kaçıyor.{/n} "Beş yüz döngü önce mi? Hayır, bu imkânsız..."

languages.text: 「地形を垂直にマッピングする機能は、私の高度な前庭オーグメティックによって定期的に更新されます。診断ログによると、最後の更新は...」{n}マゴスのヴォックス・グリルの間から驚いた息が漏れる。{/n}「500サイクル前？いや、それは不可能だ…」
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics. According to diagnostic logs, the last update occurred..." {n}A startled exhalation escapes the Magos's vox-grille.{/n} "Five hundred cycles ago? No, that is impossible..."

traits.locale_text: 「地形を垂直にマッピングする機能は、私の高度な前庭オーグメティックによって定期的に更新されます。診断ログによると、最後の更新は...」{n}マゴスのヴォックス・グリルの間から驚いた息が漏れる。{/n}「500サイクル前？いや、それは不可能だ…」

languages.text: "Die vertikale Struktur des Geländes wird regelmäßig mittels meiner Vestibularaugmentationen aktualisiert. Laut den Diagnoseprotokollen erfolgte die letzte Aktualisierung ..." {n}Ein irritiertes Keuchen entfährt dem Vox-Gitter des Magos.{/n} "Vor fünfhundert Zyklen? Nein, das ist unmöglich ..."
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics. According to diagnostic logs, the last update occurred..." {n}A startled exhalation escapes the Magos's vox-grille.{/n} "Five hundred cycles ago? No, that is impossible..."
